title: feat: auto-fetch USD→EUR from ECB in runway rebuild
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- `rebuild-sheet.mjs` now refreshes `usd_to_eur` from the ECB (frankfurter.dev) at run time instead of relying on the static `config.local.json` value
- Falls back to the config value when the fetch fails (e.g. the daily cron runs offline)
- New `lib/fx.mjs` (pure parser + fetch wrapper) with unit tests
- Fixes the FX rate silently going stale — it had been sitting at an April rate for months, overstating USD costs in EUR by ~5%

gist.headline: Fresh Exchange Rates
gist.blurb: Our internal runway scripts now automatically fetch the latest USD to EUR exchange rates from the European Central Bank. No more stale math!
gist.summary: The internal runway rebuild script now automatically fetches the latest USD to EUR exchange rate from the European Central Bank via frankfurter.dev, falling back to a static config if offline.
gist.impact: Internal financial calculations now use up-to-date currency conversions automatically, fixing a stale rate issue that was overstating USD costs in EUR by about 5%.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as an accountant, looking at a retro terminal showing currency symbols ($, €) and a chart. The Nomnom creature eating old static config files.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at a retro computer monitor displaying glowing lime green (#ecf874) currency symbols and a small financial chart. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating old paper spreadsheets. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
